title: RUSTINS Strypit Spray, 500 ml
availability_text: Only 9 left in stock (more on the way).
features: All the benefits of Rustins Strypit in an easy to apply aerosol format - Just Spray on!
Non drip, ideal for use on vertical surfaces
Orange coloured, to see where applied
description: From the manufacturer Rustins Strypit Paint and Varnish Stripper Rustins new formula Strypit is a non-caustic dichloromethane-free gel suitable for removing multiple coats of paints and varnishes applied to wood, metal, glass, stone and masonry surfaces. Strypit works best when applied liberally and allowed to penetrate after two applications. The gel consistency permits effective use on vertical surfaces. Water and solvent washable Removes multiple coats Non drip, ideal for use on vertical surfaces Does not contain Methylene Chloride (DCM) Comes in various sizes and also available as an aerosol
